title: daphne pseudoretusa
intro: Daphne pseudoretusa, also known as the Japanese spurge, is a type of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Daphne pseudoretusa include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Daphne pseudoretusa is typically used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and ointments, although its use is often limited due to its toxicity and potential skin irritation.
